select.heading: Select
select.text: A single-select dropdown rendered at all three available sizes (sm, md, lg) with the label hidden.

multiple.heading: Multiple Select
multiple.text: A multi-select dropdown rendered at all three sizes, with two items preselected and the field marked as required.

search.heading: Searchable Select
search.text: Both a searchable multi-select and a searchable single-select using a large option list; search is explicitly enabled via the search parameter.

description.heading: Select with Description
description.text: A select field with an additional description line rendered below the label to provide extra context or instructions.

helper-text.heading: Select with Helper Text
helper-text.text: A select field with a small helper text rendered below the component using the helperText parameter.

error-message.heading: Select with Error Message
error-message.text: A select field in an invalid state, showing how the errorMessage parameter attaches a validation message to the component.

preselected.heading: Preselected Option
preselected.text: A single-select dropdown with one option preselected on load using the preselected parameter with a scalar key.

required.heading: Required Select
required.text: A required single-select field that displays a required asterisk next to the label and removes the clear button.

max-selections.heading: Multiple Select with Max Selections
max-selections.text: A multi-select dropdown limited to two simultaneous selections using the maxSelections parameter.

rounded.heading: Rounded Select
rounded.text: A select field styled with the c-select--rounded modifier class, producing a pill-shaped button appearance often used for filters.
